hero.label: About Us
hero.title: Invoicemonk is built for people who take their work seriously.
hero.description: Freelancers, founders, and growing businesses power the global economy — but behind the scenes, many struggle with turning their income into structured, compliant, and credible financial records.

story.p1prefix: That's where we come in. Invoicemonk is a compliance-first revenue platform that helps businesses take control of how they earn, track, and prove their income. From
story.p1suffix: and financial reporting, everything we build is designed to ensure your business isn't just running — but running properly.
story.p2: We believe getting paid is only part of the journey. What matters just as much is how that income is recorded, structured, and presented — because that's what unlocks bigger opportunities: access to funding, global mobility, partnerships, and long-term growth.
story.p3intro: That's why Invoicemonk goes beyond simple tools. We provide a system that helps you:
story.bullet2: Accept and track payments with clarity
story.p4prefix: Our platform is designed to be simple on the surface, but powerful underneath — so you can focus on your work, while we handle the structure that supports it. We also share knowledge through
story.p4suffix: to help you at every stage.
story.closing: We're not just helping businesses send invoices. We're helping them build credibility, stay compliant, and operate with confidence — anywhere in the world.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: To help freelancers and businesses operate compliantly, get paid confidently, and build financially credible businesses — without friction.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: To become the world's most trusted revenue and compliance infrastructure for modern businesses.

press.label: Press & Media
press.title: As Featured In
press.description: Invoicemonk has been recognized for helping small businesses and freelancers streamline their invoicing and financial management.

team.label: Our Team
team.title: Meet the Founders
team.description: The passionate team behind Invoicemonk, dedicated to empowering freelancers and small businesses across the world.

openRoles.title: Open Roles
openRoles.description: Are you interested in joining our team? We're always looking for passionate individuals to help us build the future of business tools.

whoFounded.question: Who founded Invoicemonk?
whoFounded.answer: Invoicemonk was co-founded by Olayinka Olayokun (CEO) and Joan Omionawele (Communication President), with a mission to help freelancers and businesses build financially credible operations worldwide.

mission.question: What is Invoicemonk's mission?
mission.answer: Our mission is to help freelancers and businesses operate compliantly, get paid confidently, and build financially credible businesses — without friction.

availability.question: Where is Invoicemonk available?
availability.answer: Invoicemonk is available globally and serves businesses in over 50 countries. Our compliance-first platform supports multiple currencies, regional tax requirements, and audit-ready financial records.
